Make DeepSeek your smart chat partner

DeepSeek is an AI assistant for natural dialogue, multi-turn context, coding help, and creative writing. Start for free on the official web chat.

Start free User guides

DeepSeek core capabilities

Powerful chat models for study, work, and creation — focused on everyday web chat workflows.

🤖

Smart dialogue

Natural language chat with context-aware, coherent answers.

💻

Coding help

Explain errors, review snippets, and speed up small dev tasks.

✍️

Creative writing

Drafts and rewrites for emails, copy, and report outlines.

📱

Multi-device

Chat on mobile browsers and apps, anytime, anywhere.

📚

Learning

Notes, concept explanations, and interview practice templates.

⚡

Prompt library

Copy-paste chat prompts for writing, coding, and study.
